assets.name: Secure Bootloader
assets.description: Primary bootloader responsible for verifying the authenticity and integrity of firmware images before execution.

assets.name: Device Private Key / Root of Trust
assets.description: Cryptographic private key stored securely in hardware (e.g., HSM/TPM) used for signing, authentication, and secure communication.

assets.name: OS / Kernel Configuration File
assets.description: System configuration parameters and access control lists defining runtime privileges and network settings.

assets.name: Operating System Core / Kernel
assets.description: The base operating system layer managing hardware resources, scheduling, and basic process isolation.

assets.name: BMS Master Control Application
assets.description: Firmware application running on the Battery Management System managing cell balancing, state of charge (SoC), and thermal safety thresholds.

assets.name: Inverter Calibration Parameters
assets.description: Lookup tables and fine-tuning parameters mapping throttle inputs to motor torque limits.

assets.name: Powertrain CAN Bus Messages
assets.description: Real-time critical signals including torque commands, engine speed, and transmission status transmitted over CAN.

assets.name: Electronic Stability Control (ESC) Firmware
assets.description: Embedded software controlling braking force distribution to prevent skidding and maintain vehicle traction.

assets.name: Steering Angle Sensor Signals
assets.description: Sensor outputs measuring driver steering wheel input, sent via FlexRay or CAN to the EPS (Electric Power Steering).

assets.name: Passive Entry Passive Start (PEPS) Session Token
assets.description: Ephemeral cryptographic tokens exchanged over UWB or BLE to authorize vehicle unlocking and engine start.

assets.name: IVI Operating System
assets.description: The complex high-level operating system (e.g., Linux or Android Automotive) running the In-Vehicle Infotainment system.

assets.name: User Profile and PII Data
assets.description: User specific data stored locally, including navigation history, phone sync contacts, and application credentials.

assets.name: Perception Camera Object Detection Model
assets.description: Deep learning neural network weights and models used to classify lane markings, signs, pedestrians, and vehicles.

assets.name: Autonomous Trajectory Planning Logic
assets.description: Decision-making algorithms that consume sensor data fusion and output acceleration, braking, and steering setpoints.

assets.name: Over-The-Air (OTA) Client Service
assets.description: Middleware application running inside the Telematics Control Unit handling download, staging, and orchestrating updates.

assets.name: Cellular Network Communication Channel
assets.description: The wireless communication link establishing connection between the vehicle TCU and cellular base stations.

assets.name: Central Gateway Firewall Rules
assets.description: Network configuration tables and access rules determining which Ethernet frames or CAN signals can pass between vehicle zones.

assets.name: Zonal Controller Hypervisor
assets.description: Type-1 hypervisor partitioning computing power into safety-critical domains and non-critical domains on a single High-Performance Compute platform.

assets.name: OEM Fleet Management API
assets.description: Web service API endpoint allowing the vehicle to exchange status, telemetry, and fetch configuration changes from the OEM back-end.

assets.name: Diagnostic Session Seed / Nonce
assets.description: Random numbers generated during security access (UDS $27) used to challenge external diagnostic tools before unlocking privileged functions.

assets.name: EVSE Charging Session Token
assets.description: Cryptographic tokens and keys used during ISO 15118 communication between EV and charging station to authenticate billing details.

assets.name: MACsec Key Exchange Link
assets.description: Cryptographic keys used to secure high-speed automotive Ethernet backbones against sniffing and insertion attacks.

assets.name: Hardware Security Module (HSM) Firmware
assets.description: Dedicated cryptographic processor core firmware executing safe cryptographic runtime services.

assets.name: Secure Storage / Flash Partition
assets.description: Protected non-volatile memory partition housing system files, runtime settings, and security manifests.

assets.name: One-Time Programmable (OTP) eFuses
assets.description: Hardware eFuses mapping cryptographic keys and permanent lifecycle status settings during ECU production.

assets.name: Trusted Execution Environment (TEE) Core
assets.description: Secure region of the main processor ensuring code and data loaded inside are protected with respect to confidentiality and integrity.

assets.name: True Random Number Generator (TRNG) Entropy Source
assets.description: Hardware peripheral harvesting physical entropy to generate non-deterministic random numbers for cryptographic operations.

assets.name: High-Voltage Interlock Loop (HVIL) Status Signals
assets.description: Real-time hardware signals detecting open circuits or tampering across high-voltage components.

assets.name: Torque Request Control Signals
assets.description: High-frequency operational commands controlling motor acceleration and deceleration levels.

assets.name: DC-DC Converter Configuration Matrix
assets.description: Voltage configuration profile mapping multi-domain target output ranges across low and high voltage subsystems.

assets.name: Powertrain ECU Diagnostic UDS Interface
assets.description: Unified Diagnostic Services interface allowing execution of routing, flash download routines, and override routines.

assets.name: Brake Pedal Position Sensor Readings
assets.description: Sensor output matrix capturing physical user deceleration commands forwarded to Electronic Braking Modules.

assets.name: Electric Power Steering (EPS) Calibration Maps
assets.description: Pre-programmed curves establishing dynamic torque-assist levels based on vehicle speed variables.

assets.name: Active Suspension Control Application
assets.description: Application logic orchestrating active damper behavior adjustments in real-time.

assets.name: Airbag Deployment Trigger Logic
assets.description: High-safety mathematical algorithm processing multi-axis accelerometer triggers to actuate squibs.

assets.name: SecOC Symmetric Freshness Value & Keys
assets.description: Symmetric cryptographic keys and sequence freshness values used to verify secure onboard network messaging validity.

assets.name: Immobilizer System Secret Key
assets.description: Pre-shared master cryptographic token verified during key verification sequences before enabling propulsion loops.

assets.name: Climate Control Configuration Profile
assets.description: Configuration layouts managing cabin comfort bounds and actuator parameter definitions.

assets.name: Smart Headlight Adaptive Firmware
assets.description: Control logic handling adaptive high beam shaping, leveling matrix mappings, and matrix LED operations.

assets.name: Body Control Module LIN Communications
assets.description: Low-speed master-slave bus interactions signaling door lock states, mirror controls, and panel statuses.

assets.name: Digital Cluster UI Renderer Engine
assets.description: High-performance interface application responsible for generating the digital graphical display layout.

assets.name: Instrument Cluster Telltale Status Signal
assets.description: Safety critical display flags forwarding active fault markers, MIL status, and safety warnings to display arrays.

assets.name: IVI Bluetooth Pairing Session Keys
assets.description: Link cryptographic keys generated during handset pairing protocols ensuring security over vehicle Bluetooth links.

assets.name: LiDAR / Radar Point Cloud Data Flow
assets.description: High-bandwidth raw network stream carrying object proximity telemetry from field arrays into sensor fusion boards.

assets.name: Emergency Lane Keep Safety Application
assets.description: Active safety control app logic commanding corrections upon detecting imminent lane departure paths.

assets.name: ADAS ECU Internal System Log Files
assets.description: Runtime operational event logging records tracking sensor diagnostic histories and framework faults.

assets.name: Vehicle Remote Control Session Token
assets.description: Authorization token generated via cloud authentication for locking, unlocking, or tracking vehicles remotely.

assets.name: Wi-Fi Hotspot Access Passwords
assets.description: System access string variables validating client endpoints joining local onboard wireless network boundaries.

assets.name: Telematics Public Key Infrastructure Certificate
assets.description: Device cryptographic identity certificate facilitating transport encryption validations with infrastructure nodes.

assets.name: Vehicle Service Registry Daemon
assets.description: Service registry management framework coordinating dynamic inter-process connection mapping configurations via SOME/IP or DDS protocols.

assets.name: Time Synchronization Master Clock
assets.description: Hardware system clock providing time sync indexing (gPTP) over high-speed networks for multi-sensor operations.

assets.name: Containerized Service Isolation Image
assets.description: Encapsulated user space platform instances carrying executable service stacks isolated from core architecture kernels.

assets.name: Third-Party Fleet Telemetry API
assets.description: External software interfaces routing specific functional diagnostic queries to outside vendor endpoints.

assets.name: Backend Transport Layer Security (TLS) Pre-Shared Keys
assets.description: Cryptographic symmetric secrets used to instantly construct secure pipelines towards infrastructure networks.

assets.name: UDS Security Access Secret Calculation Keys
assets.description: Secret parameters or algorithm identifiers stored within the device to validate external diagnostic unlocks.

assets.name: Companion Mobile App Authentication Token
assets.description: JSON Web Token (JWT) instances mapping active pairing authorizations originating from external owner apps.

assets.name: Key Fob RF Rolling Code Seed Matrix
assets.description: Secret seed tracking array matching cryptographically shifting authorization codes for physical access entries.

assets.name: V2X Roadside Unit (RSU) Signing Certificates
assets.description: Infrastructure credentials validating security validation bounds for incoming cooperative intersection notifications.

assets.name: Physical USB Mass Storage Interface
assets.description: Local physical communication target layer driving peripheral system updates or trace diagnostic data capture.

assets.name: OEM Firmware Verification Root Certificate
assets.description: The public root certificate or public key hash pinned in hardware used by the secure boot loader to verify the OEM's signature on incoming software updates.

assets.name: XCP/CCP Calibration Session Authorization Key
assets.description: The seed/key pair or session token that unlocks ASAM XCP or CCP protocols, which allow engineers (or attackers) to read and directly manipulate raw ECU memory during runtime.

assets.name: Hardware Debug Port (JTAG/SWD) Fuse Configuration
assets.description: The logical configuration state (often controlled by eFuses) that commands the SoC or MCU to permanently lock or disable physical JTAG/SWD debug interfaces before production release.

assets.name: ISO 15118 Plug & Charge Contract Certificates
assets.description: The Electric Vehicle Provisioning and Contract Certificates stored in the vehicle to allow automatic cloud authentication and direct financial billing when plugging into a charger.

assets.name: V2X Security Credential Pseudonym Keys
assets.description: Short-lived cryptographic certificates used to sign outgoing V2X Cooperative Awareness Messages (CAM), designed to change frequently to protect vehicle tracking privacy.

assets.name: GNSS / NMEA Raw Positioning Data Flow
assets.description: The live coordinates, time sync references, and velocity vectors coming from the satellite receiver to the navigation module and ADAS automated driving domain.

assets.name: End-to-End (E2E) Protection Configuration Profile
assets.description: The software check settings (CRCs, counters, and data IDs) mapping AUTOSAR E2E configurations used to detect transmission faults and data injection over functional safety networks.

assets.name: GMSL High-Speed Video Raw Signal
assets.description: The raw, uncompressed high-bandwidth deserializer video pipeline connecting ADAS surround cameras directly to the central SoC perception hardware processing engine.

assets.name: DoIP Edge Routing Configuration Table
assets.description: The edge network rule layer defining diagnostic addressing routing bounds for processing Diagnostics over IP (ISO 13400) requests down into core sub-buses.

assets.name: IPsec VPN Tunnel Security Associations
assets.description: The dynamic keys, security parameter indexes (SPI), and policies maintaining the encrypted cloud telemetry pipeline between the Telematics module and the OEM Cloud Backend.

assets.name: Intrusion Detection System (IDPS) Rule Signature Matrix
assets.description: The baseline threshold patterns, whitelist matrices, and payload signature parameters used by the onboard IDPS to classify malicious CAN frames or anomalous Ethernet traffic.

assets.name: Diagnostic Log and Trace (DLT) Core Channel
assets.description: The system-wide logging protocol interface (e.g., AUTOSAR DLT) streaming real-time debugging logs, trace strings, and software runtime warnings from across the internal network.

assets.name: Software Bill of Materials (SBOM) Manifest Hash
assets.description: The cryptographically signed inventory manifest of binary component versions and supply chain identifiers deployed on the high-performance compute zone used for verifying update baseline validity.

assets.name: Feature-on-Demand (FoD) Cryptographic Activation Keys
assets.description: Symmetric or asymmetric token keys parsed by the gateway or infotainment module to selectively unlock premium optional vehicle capabilities.

assets.name: UN R155 Local Security Audit Trail Store
assets.description: The non-volatile, append-only local storage partition dedicated to tracking authenticated security events, failed remote login attempts, and policy violations for continuous regulatory auditing.

assets.name: AUTOSAR RTE Inter-Runnable Context Variables
assets.description: The local virtual shared-memory addresses handling high-speed inter-task data exchanges between application runnables isolated inside the same microcontroller block.

assets.name: ISO 14229-1 AP Authenticated Diagnostics Certificates
assets.description: Asymmetric public key credentials used during modern advanced diagnostic procedures (instead of seed-key pairs) to safely negotiate token authorizations with external OEM client tools.

assets.name: Drive-by-Wire Control Command Arbitration Logic
assets.description: The central algorithmic software routing engine determining controller privilege priority when concurrent trajectory manipulation requests compete.

assets.name: Ethernet AVB/TSN Quality of Service Stream Reservation Mappings
assets.description: The specific logical channel allocation configuration defining bandwidth priority mappings (IEEE 802.1Qav) across zonal networks to ensure time-critical frames bypass low-priority entertainment streams.

assets.name: High-Voltage Pyrofuse Detonation Trigger
assets.description: The physical electric actuator circuit command line fired by safety or battery modules to instantly sever power loops during extreme crash situations or thermal runaway indicators.

assets.name: Network Communication Database Files (DBC / FIBEX Matrix)
assets.description: The static network definition databases (DBC for CAN, FIBEX/ARXML for FlexRay) that map raw bit offsets to physical signals.

assets.name: Central Gateway Signal-to-Signal Translation Maps
assets.description: The legacy routing matrix used by the central gateway to copy a raw signal out of a CAN frame, translate it, and pack it into a FlexRay slot or LIN frame for another domain.

assets.name: UDS Diagnostic 'Tester Present' ($3E) Session State Control
assets.description: The logical safety timing loop that maintains an unlocked programming session. If hijacked or kept persistently high via timing manipulation, the ECU stays in a vulnerable diagnostic state.

assets.name: Ethernet Virtual LAN (VLAN 802.1Q) Isolation Mapping Table
assets.description: The configuration matrix on the central switch that segments a single physical automotive Ethernet backbone into isolated logical networks.

assets.name: Service-Oriented Architecture (SOA) Governance & Permission Files
assets.description: The access control configurations (such as DDS Security governance XML or SOME/IP IAM policies) that explicitly define which specific application components or containerized pods are allowed to subscribe/publish to particular vehicle methods.

assets.name: Adaptive AUTOSAR Execution Manifests
assets.description: The deployment configuration manifests that determine dependency constraints, scheduling properties, and resource allocation policies for dynamic applications starting up on a high-performance compute platform.

assets.name: Central High-Performance Compute Platform (HPC)
assets.description: Physical core compute hardware enclosure housing multi-core SoCs, shared memory channels, and high-speed network switch chips.

assets.name: Telematics Control Unit (TCU) PCB Node
assets.description: Physical electronic control unit assembly managing wireless connectivity modems, transceivers, and positioning chips.

assets.name: ADAS Central Domain Controller ECU
assets.description: High-throughput safety hardware platform hosting perception hardware acceleration matrix processing nodes, GPUs, and NPUs.

assets.name: In-Vehicle Infotainment (IVI) Core Head Unit
assets.description: Physical hardware unit driving complex dashboard displays, passenger screens, radio receivers, and high-level operating system architectures.

assets.name: Battery Management System (BMS) Electronic Control Unit
assets.description: Physical microcontroller board monitoring cell balancing circuitry, thermistors, and safety pyrofuse triggers.

assets.name: Electronic Power Steering (EPS) Mechatronic Housing
assets.description: Physical mechatronic assembly grouping the steering angle sensor, steering controller microcontroller, and electric assist motor.

assets.name: Electronic Stability Control (ESC) Valve Block Assembly
assets.description: The integrated chassis control module containing the hydraulic valve driver microcontrollers and braking pressure sensor loops.

assets.name: Central Gateway (CGW) Routing Module
assets.description: Legacy standalone hardware routing block linking multiple physical vehicle communication rings (CAN, LIN, FlexRay) before cross-domain central computing switches.
